case_title: KIM, JONG VS WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. et al

docket_entries.description: WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS SUBSTITUTED IN THE ACTION IN PLACE OF JOHNSON.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY KIM, JONG AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. BLASKO,PETER DBA WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLASKO,PETER DBA WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, JONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. BLASKO,PETER DBA WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CO DEFT GEORGE L. JOHNSON IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. POS WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
